libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generated tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer and temporary files; no external service is required. For Native Image runs on JDK 25/current-defaults, ensure the native test runtime sets `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1/Netty 4.2.x as well, rather than only when `libraryVersion == '5.0.0'`.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient depends on optional `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2`; add it only if tests deliberately cover OAuth2WebClient.
POJO JSON mapping may require optional Jackson databind; meaningful WebClient coverage can avoid this by using Vert.x JsonObject/Buffer codecs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for normal Vert.x Web Client coverage, but the resolved 5.0.1 stack uses Netty 4.2.x and the existing native-test workaround is scoped only to 5.0.0.
